rationale: PR title 'fix: forward insecure git access env to sandboxes' matches the diff in openhands/app_server/sandbox/sandbox_spec_service.py which adds AUTO_FORWARD_VARIABLES = ('ALLOW_INSECURE_GIT_ACCESS',) alongside AUTO_FORWARD_PREFIXES, with a new Step 1 loop that copies exact-name vars from os.environ before the prefix loop. Docstring and step-numbering comments updated consistently. The test file tests/unit/app_server/test_agent_server_env_override.py adds a TestExactAutoForwarding class with three meaningful tests (membership check, isolation from OTHER_VAR, precedence of OH_AGENT_SERVER_ENV explicit override) plus a new test_docker_specs_include_insecure_git_access_env in TestDockerSandboxSpecEnvironmentOverride. Real assertions, not tautologies. This is a parallel implementation to PR #14535 (same issue #14523) with a slightly different code shape; both are legitimate fixes.
